history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person with spiky, dyed gray hair stands outdoors, looking down with their left hand in their pocket and their right hand raised, showing the middle finger. They are wearing a black Real Madrid soccer jersey with white accents and "BenQ SIEMENS" logo on the front, and extremely wide-leg, dark wash denim jeans. The person is also wearing white sneakers. The background features a textured gray wall on the left and a light blue wall on the right, with two dark gray electrical boxes mounted on the blue wall. The ground is paved with gray bricks and some scattered leaves. The lighting appears to be natural daylight, casting soft shadows. The overall mood is casual and somewhat defiant. The color palette is dominated by black, gray, white, and light blue.
